data.content: 1. The requested app-level and CLI-level hierarchy guard behaviors are covered by passing tests, including direct-child blocking, deferred-child provenance, terminal cascade approval/cascade paths, recursive descendants, and next/state/update error reporting. 2. Approval is blocked because the required sanity gate is not green: 'make sanity' fails in the coverage stage with cargo tarpaulin error 'Failed to generate report: No such file or directory (os error 2)'. 3. This violates the implementation review requirement to verify all sanity gates pass before moving to shipment.
